title: Thol Heat Wave
lead: Thol is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +5.80. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Thol are characterized by high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 19.3 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 26%, and the wind speed is relatively low at 4.0 km/h. 
 The heat wave has resulted in no Heating Degree Days (HDD), indicating extremely hot conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
